navigation.style: h-16 border-b border-border bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(234,179,8,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary hover:bg-secondary/20 rounded-sm font-medium border border-white/10 px-6 py-3

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-surface border border-white/5 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-xl hover:border-white/10 transition-colors
cards.movie_poster: aspect-[2/3] rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-2xl hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform duration-300 relative group border border-white/5

inputs.default: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 h-12 rounded-md text-white placeholder:text-white/20

feature_specific_guidelines.box_office_map: Use a stylized list or simple SVG map for countries. Clicking a country expands to show cities. Use color intensity (Red to Gold) to show revenue heat.
feature_specific_guidelines.chat_system: Chat bubbles must be distinct. User (Gold/Right), Others (Grey/Left). Voice notes should appear as audio waveforms. Private chats support image previews.
feature_specific_guidelines.film_wizard: Step-by-step process. Use a progress bar at the top. Each step (Script -> Cast -> Sponsor -> etc.) should feel like a distinct phase of production.
feature_specific_guidelines.real_time_clock: Display 'Game Date' prominently in the top bar. It syncs with real days but might have a different year.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (AA standard minimum).
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders until the user generates their own content.
Implement the 'Bebas Neue' font for all headings to maintain the cinematic brand.
The Top Navigation is critical. It must contain the User Profile, Game Date, and Company Funds.
Use the 'gradients.cinema_glow' class for hero sections or winning moments.
For the Chart components, use a custom tooltip that matches the dark theme (bg-surface border-white/10).
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
